inline_comments.message:
We may have further work here (based on REQ-379 to align with recommended version and use ONAP/base image - https://git.onap.org/integration/docker/onap-java11/tree/Dockerfile) for Guilin.

The current base image may not be an issue, however there is on-going discussion (if alpine image should be created/maintained) between TSC and SECCOM.

Will approve this now. Will create separate jira once TSC confirms on target base image and if further work is required to align.
